title: Cyberware: Visible Modifications
description: Addon to Cyberware: Reforged that adds overhauled aesthetics with high mod compatibility.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67b330cf0f93ff08ca3212b75476ad703a616449.png)
![Steve with cyberware](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fce3ba6c965e11235091d1895411c43a1d6caba.png)


### Cyberware: Visible Modifications - Overview

Cyborgs are awesome. I mean, who doesn't love the idea of replacing half your insides with cool tech? I know I do. 

You might not know it's possible to become a powerful cyborg in Minecraft. The mod [Cyberware: Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/cyberware-reforged) is a very welcome port of the original Cyberware mod to the 1.20.1 version, making it possible for this delightfully gruesome mod to finally make its way to modern Minecraft. But... it has some room for improvement. 

This mod aims to fix the mod compatibility and visual glitches of Cyberware: Reforged while giving the cyborg player a full visual overhaul. Now, you can look the part of a cyborg with all your favorite mods fixed, including Epic Fight, GeckoLib, EMF, and more.

### Demo - Full Cyborg
Here's a quick clip of the mod in action. This is how your appearance changes with all modifications included in this mod installed. 

![Cyberware: Visible Modifications Demo](https://i.imgur.com/w9OuVz4.gif)

### Feature List
The mod includes visible parts when the following cybernetics are installed:

- Cardiovascular Pump (Heart)

- Cyber Arms

- Cyber Legs

- Cyber Eye

They'll swap out dynamically, and only the parts you have installed will show. If you install Synthetic Skin, the visible modifications will be disabled. 

Another feature is what I like to call 'Gloriously Gruesome Dynamic Dismemberment.' If you've gotten rid of your arms and legs, it'll show. Because, for some reason... you can get rid of your arms and legs with the Cyberware mod. 

And did I say it has lights? Yeah... it has lights. 

### Compatability 
Since it is the point, it should be compatible with almost anything. 

The only possible exception are mods that change or hide your skin, since this mod works by swapping out your player skin. Otherwise, there shouldn't be any issues. 

### Modpacks?
If you're publishing the pack, it needs to be on either Modrinth or Curseforge.

### A huge thanks to love_vivi for porting the Cyberware mod to 1.20.1, and to Flaxbeard for making the original. 

Please note that I am not affiliated with either. This mod is an unofficial project.

### Interested in reading sci-fi / fantasy? Check out my books!

[Seven Systems - Google Play Books](https://play.google.com/store/books/series?id=XbtfHAAAABADpM) There are links to more platforms and formats on my discord.

In the stars above, an ancient evil stirs.

An artifact of vast power will shake the foundations of the seven star systems inhabited by all living beings. In the coming storm, only those who have lived in its shadow can stand against evil. A group tied together by the threads of fate and prophesy embark on a quest through the vast worlds of The Seven Systems, and fight those who would succumb to the temptation of darkness. The prince. His brother. The twin guards. The thief. The one who changed, and will change. Will they stand together long enough to do what is necessary... or pay the price? Will the worlds see their next sunrise, the dawn of a new age, or will all fall to the forces of evil? As the scales of power tip and swing, the worlds will never be the same.

With the new day, The Seven Systems are cast into the flames...
